cases.prompt: 온보딩 만들어줘. 첫 화면 플로우랑 빈 상태 카피, 권한 사전설득까지.

assertions.text: Defines a first-run sequence and N-step setup checklist.
Produces empty-state copy and notification/permission priming.
Plants activation events per step and drop-off measurement.

cases.prompt: Build the onboarding flow from the aha moment we found, on top of our RN/Expo UI.

assertions.text: Takes a found aha moment and builds it into an actual first-run flow.
Layers activation/TTFV intent on top of native UI.
